record_types.name: CONFIG_Register
ENABLE_Register
ERRORSRC_Register
EVENTS_CTS_Register
EVENTS_ERROR_Register
EVENTS_NCTS_Register
EVENTS_RXDRDY_Register
EVENTS_RXTO_Register
EVENTS_TXDRDY_Register
INTENCLR_Register

fields.name: CTS
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable interrupt for NCTS event

fields.name: NCTS
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable interrupt for RXDRDY event

fields.name: Reserved_3_6
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable interrupt for TXDRDY event

fields.name: Reserved_8_8
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable interrupt for ERROR event

fields.name: Reserved_10_16
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable interrupt for RXTO event

record_types.name: INTENSET_Register

fields.name: CTS
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable interrupt for NCTS event

fields.name: NCTS
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable interrupt for RXDRDY event

fields.name: Reserved_3_6
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable interrupt for TXDRDY event

fields.name: Reserved_8_8
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable interrupt for ERROR event

fields.name: Reserved_10_16
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable interrupt for RXTO event

record_types.name: RXD_Register
SHORTS_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_2
fields.description: Shortcut between CTS event and STARTRX task

fields.name: CTS_STARTRX
fields.description: Shortcut between NCTS event and STOPRX task

record_types.name: TASKS_STARTRX_Register
TASKS_STARTTX_Register
TASKS_STOPRX_Register
TASKS_STOPTX_Register
TASKS_SUSPEND_Register
TXD_Register
UART_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_SUSPEND
fields.description: CTS is activated (set low). Clear To Send.

fields.name: EVENTS_CTS
fields.description: CTS is deactivated (set high). Not Clear To Send.

fields.name: BAUDRATE
fields.description: Configuration of parity and hardware flow control

variables.name: UART0_Periph
variables.code:
UART0_Periph : aliased UART_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => UART0_Base;
